description.ko: 반투명한 막과 빛나는 수액 통로를 통해 자연의 리드미컬한 호흡을 표현한 생물학적 걸작입니다.
description.en: A biological masterpiece representing the rhythmic breathing of nature through translucent membranes and glowing sap channels.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Pulmonary Coral Reef.' A central breathing organ made of translucent #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D vascular vines, pulsing slowly in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void. The entity exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent bubbles that flow like liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable cellular textures and glowing internal sap channels. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine organic flow.
